candidate_lines.line: Move to any unowned planet space between you and the next
If you pass GO while in Hyperdrive, do not collect 200 Credits.
Take one of your Bases from the Bank and use it to either:
• Take over an unowned planet space; or
Take a load off and recharge your power couplings.
Move your token to the In Jail space immediately.
Do not collect 200 Credits.
You cannot collect any rent or
take part in auctions while you’re In Jail.
So, how do you get out of Jail?
• Pay 100 Credits to the Bank at the start of your next turn, then roll and
• Use a Get Out of Jail Free card.
roll a double by your third turn in Jail, pay 100 Credits and use your last
roll to move as normal.
Pay 200 Credits to the Bank.
• In case of a draw, the winner is the player who owns the highest-placed Base.
• To buy it, pay the price shown on the outer board space , then put one of
You must pay the owner rent.
the owned hexagonal Base space , but the amount you have to pay
• If the owner is an enemy, you must pay the full rent.
• If an ally, you only pay half the rent!
